npc_01_start.text: Tick-unit! You're... mobile? That's not in the schema.

npc_01_archive.text: The Archive is sealed. Only those with sufficient soul-fragments may enter. You'll need at least 3 fragments to unlock the final door.

npc_01_hint.text: The broken machinery in the east wings carry them. But beware the enforcers in the boss chamber.

npc_01_fix.text: A noble pursuit. Though everything here eventually breaks anyway. Such is the system.

npc_02_start.text: Oh! A functioning bot? I thought I was the only one left...

npc_02_lore.text: The Great Dispatch came, but not all of us were ready. Now we wander, half-filed, forever seeking the right cabinet...

npc_02_where.text: Processing halted. Everyone froze mid-stamp. I've been standing here for... how long?

npc_02_exit.text: The Central Archive? That's where the dispatchers reside. They won't see you. You're just a bot.

npc_02_end.text: Keep going. Don't end up like me.
